3149180.name: Afterblast
3149180.description:
Afterblast is an exhilarating, high-octane multiplayer first-person shooter that takes action to new heights with its dynamic parkour mechanics.

Players navigate through crumbling urban landscapes, leaping across rooftops and engaging in combat with a diverse arsenal of weapons and gadgets.

Every match is a fast-paced adrenaline rush where strategy and agility are key.

Whether you're dodging enemy fire or performing parkour maneuvers, Afterblast delivers a experience that keeps you on the edge of your seat. Join the fight, master your parkour skills, and dominate the battlefield with the ultimate test of reflexes and tactics.

Explore the newly added gamemodes, Capture the Flag and Deathmatch, as well as team-based modes.
3149180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
